title: Is there a way to move files to an account automatically?
excerpt: I am using Enterprise CRM Template. On the Legal Request board, we have added an executed documents file column and mirrored in both Opportunity and Accounts Board . What I would like to do is have the documents appear i…

posts.author: NEM (Chelley Andrews)
posts.cookedHtml: I am using Enterprise CRM Template. On the Legal Request board, we have added an executed documents file column and mirrored in both Opportunity and Accounts Board . What I would like to do is have the documents appear in the files section without having to upload. Is there an automation for this?
